recommendations.title: The Domestics
recommendations.overview: A young husband and wife must fight to return home in a post-apocalyptic mid-western landscape ravaged by gangs.

recommendations.title: Silent Night, Deadly Night

recommendations.title: V/H/S/85
recommendations.overview: Unveiled through a made-for-TV documentary, five chilling tales of found footage horror emerge to take viewers on a gore-filled journey through the grim underbelly of the forgotten 1980s.
recommendations.director: Natasha Kermani, David Bruckner, Gigi Saul Guerrero, Mike P. Nelson, Scott Derrickson

recommendations.title: Without Warning
recommendations.overview: Sandy and Greg are teenagers who go camping, despite warnings not to, with their friends. They soon encounter aliens, who are using the area as a hunting ground.

recommendations.title: Sweet November

recommendations.title: Mandela: Long Walk to Freedom
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of Nelson Mandela's life journey from his childhood in a rural village through to his inauguration as the first democratically elected president of South Africa.

recommendations.title: All My Life

recommendations.title: Sovereign

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
